name: relay10
description: Eight small, on-demand DisciplinedRun skills for evidence-led repository work.

interface.shortDescription: Route, build, review, and release with evidence.
interface.longDescription: A clean-room pack of eight focused skills for research, specification, implementation, debugging, review, release proof, and skill evaluation. The plugin guides DisciplinedRun workflows and can call the disciplinedrun or legacy r10 CLI; it does not switch the current Codex task model.
defaultPrompt: Route this repository task with the smallest safe DisciplinedRun workflow.
Review this change and separate findings from evidence gaps.
Prepare release proof without publishing anything yet.
